student_journey.title: Inquiry
student_journey.description: Students can contact the institute by visiting the campus, calling the institute, emailing, or submitting an inquiry through the official website.

student_journey.title: Career Counselling
student_journey.description: Students receive guidance to select the most suitable course based on their educational background, interests, and career goals.

student_journey.title: Course Selection
student_journey.description: Students choose a course from various categories including IT, Software Development, Data Analytics, Accounting, Graphic Designing, Cyber Security, and Professional Skill Development.

student_journey.title: Admission
student_journey.description: Complete the admission process by submitting the required documents and paying the applicable course fee.

student_journey.title: Training Begins
student_journey.description: Students attend instructor-led classroom or online sessions with practical demonstrations and assignments.

student_journey.title: Practical Learning
student_journey.description: Students work on hands-on projects, coding exercises, laboratory sessions, assignments, and real-world case studies.

student_journey.title: Assessment
student_journey.description: Knowledge is evaluated through practical tests, assignments, projects, quizzes, and instructor assessments.

student_journey.title: Certification
student_journey.description: After successfully completing the course requirements, eligible students receive a course completion certificate.

student_journey.title: Placement Assistance
student_journey.description: The institute provides career guidance, resume building, interview preparation, and placement support wherever applicable.

student_journey.title: Career Growth
student_journey.description: Students can continue learning through advanced courses, skill upgrades, and professional development programs.

certificate.description: Course completion certificates are provided for eligible courses after successful completion of training requirements.
